prompt: Create an ultra-kawaii anime illustration in a bright Harajuku decora / yume-kawaii style. A single chibi angel girl stands centered, filling most of a wide 16:9 canvas, surrounded by an overwhelming collage of pastel stickers, charms, beads, bows, hearts, stars, candy, flowers, and sparkles. The character has very long fluffy pale pink-blonde twin-tail hair with many tiny braids and bead strands, decorated with daisies, purple flowers, heart charms, pearl chains, and glitter accessories. She wears a frilly pastel lavender and white dress with layered ruffles, a large bow at the chest, heart jewelry, bracelets, and small white angel wings partly visible behind her. Her right hand reaches toward the viewer in a foreshortened open-palm pose, while her left hand holds a small pink-and-blue cylindrical wand or lip-gloss-like charm. Cover the center of her face with a large plain square pastel censor/placeholder block, soft blush-pink with no features, positioned from forehead to chin, making the face intentionally hidden while the hair and accessories remain visible around it. The background is extremely dense, saturated, and playful, with cyan, hot pink, lavender, yellow, and white as the dominant colors, glossy highlights, confetti, bubbles, starbursts, and sticker outlines. Include exactly 6 readable pop-art sticker texts: “LOVE!” in a cloud bubble at upper left, “WOW!” in a blue bubble on the left, “KIRA KIRA!” in a pink bubble at upper right, “Chu!” in a teal-and-pink bubble on the right, “YEAH!” in a yellow bubble at lower right, and “Angel” inside a neon heart at the top right. Add numerous non-text decorative stickers including a blue checkered bow, pink hearts, yellow stars, lollipops, ribbons, wings, and candy shapes, all with thick white sticker borders. The image should feel cute, chaotic, glossy, magical, and sparkly, like a maximalist Japanese idol sticker collage. High detail, clean anime line art, soft shading, luminous pastel glow, crisp sticker typography, no watermark, no extra text beyond the 6 specified words.
